title: Pharmacological Characterization of Crotamine Effects on Mice Hind Limb Paralysis
author: Sunamita Lima
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p7ydrpw

steps.title: All the animals should be divided...
steps.instruction: All the animals should be divided in two groups each of control (normal saline, 10 ml/kg, i.p), and treated group with the substance to be tested.

steps.title: After 30 min of step 1...
steps.instruction: After 30 min of step 1 the animals should be treated intraperitonialy (i.p.) with crotamine for induction of writhing. After 5 min of injection, the number of abdominal constrictions (writhes) should be counted for 30 min. The i.p. injection of anything caused writhing due puncturing of peritoneal membrane and these writhing due to injection terminated within in 5 min of post administration.
